name: Chickpeas Sundried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups dried chickpeas, soaked and cooked until tender
3 oz sun-dried tomatoes, rehydrated and pureed
1/4 cup onion, reserved for later use
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve about 1/4 cup of chopped onion and sauté it in a wok or deep frying pan until slightly dry.
2. Add the sun-dried tomatoes (rehydrated and pureed) and dried red chilies to the reserved onions. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until you have a thick paste.
3. Stir in the cumin and ground coriander seed for about a minute.
4. Add chickpea water, turmeric, garam masala, and enough cayenne pepper for desired heat level. Salt to taste.
5. Gently incorporate the cooked chickpeas into the sauce. Allow it to simmer until the sauce reduces and clings to the chickpeas.
6. Mix in the reserved chopped onion, lemon juice (from 2 lemons), minced fresh green chilies, grated fresh ginger (start with a small piece), and additional salt if desired.
7. Serve over rice or bulgur.
